title: Flavored Reforged
description: Semi-Vanilla modpack to play with your friends.
body:
![Modpack Name](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bddb4404f940589051f434b190eb9fc5649ea56f.png)
![Lining3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1722b8939cd79d9e56783af07ce4ed6054b094c2.png)
Join forces, explore, and create unforgettable memories in this immersive Minecraft experience. Embark on thrilling adventures with your friends in this modpack designed for cooperative play.
![Lining](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1722b8939cd79d9e56783af07ce4ed6054b094c2.png)
**Todo** :
This modpack was made with the intention to grow in mods and staying semi-vanilla while waiting for more mods to be ported to 1.21.
List of future mods added : Sophisticated Backpacks, Mob Plaques, Cave Dust, Easy Magic, Easy Anvils, Immersive UI, Visual Workbench and more !
![Lining2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1722b8939cd79d9e56783af07ce4ed6054b094c2.png)
